tasks.subject: Task 0: Extend config.py with all new settings
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add all new env-driven settings (workers, Redis, cache, admission, async).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/config.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new fields with spec defaults", "existing unchanged", "MAX_ACTIVE_JOBS=8"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: extractor_core.py pure synchronous cores
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure sync clean_core + header_footer_core producing exact body dicts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/extractor_core.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_extractor_core.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_extractor_core.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clean_core matches boilerpy3", "header_footer_core non-debug + debug keys"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: extractor_service offload + router refactor + Dockerfile workers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** to_thread offload (no cache yet) + routers call service + uvicorn workers. Removes 0-bytes/30s timeout.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/extractor_service.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/routers/clean.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/routers/extract.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/Dockerfile", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_extractor_service.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_extractor_service.py tests/test_clean.py tests/test_extract.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["identical responses", "handlers call extractor_service", "to_thread offload", "Dockerfile --workers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: admission.py sync inflight guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 503+Retry-After on overload, disabled by default (SYNC_MAX_INFLIGHT=0).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/admission.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/metrics.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/routers/clean.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/routers/extract.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_admission.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_admission.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["0 always admits", "caps + releases", "router 503 Retry-After"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: result_cache.py versioned content-hash cache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cache-aside, never raises (guarded on redis_client), debug-aware key.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/result_cache.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/metrics.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/requirements.txt", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_result_cache.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_result_cache.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clean_key deterministic+format-sensitive", "hf_key sort only when !debug", "never raise without client", "roundtrip+version-miss"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire cache into extractor_service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** run_clean/run_header_footer cache-aside + force_refresh + hit/miss metrics.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/extractor_service.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_extractor_service.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_extractor_service.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hit returns cached+CACHE_HITS", "miss computes+CACHE_MISSES", "force_refresh skips read"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: schemas/async_jobs.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** submit + status pydantic models.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/schemas/async_jobs.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_async_jobs.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_async_jobs.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CleanAsyncRequest >=1 item default mc 4", "HF >=2 refs", "status response shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: async_jobs.py core (JobStore/JobManager/poll_status)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Redis-backed generic async job subsystem (shared cache_service pool) + async metrics.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/async_jobs.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/metrics.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_async_jobs.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_async_jobs.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["poll_status stale", "submit disabled/unavailable/capacity", "idempotent re-submit 200", "completed has results", "shutdown marks failed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: extractor_service.run_batch injected runner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dispatch by job_type, concurrent under semaphore, fixed-size indexed results, per-item failure isolation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/core/extractor_service.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_extractor_service.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_extractor_service.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["order-aligned results", "per-item failure isolated", "progress_cb called"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: async routers + main.py lifespan wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /clean-async, /extract/header-footer-async, /jobs/{id}; lifespan redis pool + JobManager.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/app/routers/async_jobs.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/main.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_async_jobs.py", "apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service/tests/test_main.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/content-extractor-api-service && python -m pytest tests/test_async_jobs.py tests/test_main.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["202 -> poll completed", "disabled 503 no Retry-After", "unknown 404", "lifespan smoke"]}
```
